feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to debug an application job in s/4hana public cloud (similar to debugging a job from SM37)?
entry.content: How to debug an application job in s/4hana public cloud (similar to debugging a job from SM37)? Is there a standard way of doing this like how we put JDBG in SM37? Or do we have to write a test class implementing the if_oo_adt_classrun interface where we manually call the class called by the application job?

entry.title: Question regarding Brown Field Key User Extensibility and leveraging ABAP Managed Fields in CFLs.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Greetings 🙂

I have a question regarding Brown Field Key User Extensibility and leveraging custom database fields (ABAP Managed Fields) in Custom Fields and Logic (CFL).

Specifically, I'm wondering:

1. Upgrade Safety: If we use the GUI T-code SUFD_EUI to prepare custom database fields (ABAP Managed Fields) to use in CFL, will these prepared fields remain upgrade-safe? Are there any limitations or potential compatibility issues we should be aware of?


2. Alternative Approaches: Are there any alternative methods to leverage existing ABAP Managed Fields into CFL?

Thanks in advance for your insights!

 

 ABAP Extensibility

entry.title: Transport log of TR in Eclipse ADT - S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Once TR is released from Dev system and imported in QA/PROD system I see that transport log is not updated in DEV system(checked in Eclipse ADT) to show whether TR is imported in QA/PROD or not.

To verify, I have to go in QA system and check the TR. 

Did any one face this issue or is other any other way to check TR log in S/4 HANA Public cloud.

entry.title: Creating Custom Fiori App for Manage Customer Materials using Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am creating a custom Fiori app for Manage Customer Materials of S4Hana cloud using Developer Extensibility.

And I would like to ask some questions related to this creation.

for this app, I found the entity named I_CustomerMaterial, I_CustomerMaterialTP and I_CustomerMaterial_2 in eclipse ABAP development tools.

But these all 3 entities cannot used in ABAP logic.

The following error occurs.

So, I checked in Released Objects and in Released Objects, all these 3 entities do not exist.

Is it the reason why the above error occurs?

And I would like to ask that if is there any other way to create custom Fiori app for Manage Customer Material or it cannot be possible to create custom Fiori app for Manage Customer Material?

If there is any unclear point in my question, pleas ask me for details.

Thank You.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Creating Custom Fiori App for Manage Purchasing Info Record using Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to create custom Fiori app for Manage Purchasing Info Record app of S4Hana cloud using Developer Extensibility (CDS views of Eclipse ABAP development tools).

And there are some difficulties encountered in developing this custom Fiori app.

1. "Supplier does not exists" error keeps occurring if the value selected from the custom app is used because it only has length 8.

Standard value length of Supplier field is 10.

So, it is ok if fixed value is used in the logic by adding leading zeros up to length 10.

Is there any entity that have length 10 automatically in CDS Views or is there any way to fix this error?

In metadata extension, I used the following entity and entity name for this selection.

2. Although creating Purchasing Info Record using custom Fiori app is ok, updating is not ok because from ABAP logic, I cannot get Info Record Number that is system auto-generated.

I need to use this Info Record Number as key in Update Entity ABAP logic.

So, I would like to ask that if is there any way to update Purchasing Info Record without using Purchasing Info Record Number or is there any way (logic) to get Purchasing Info Record Number?

If there is any unclear point in my questions, please ask me for details.

Thank You.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Communication Arrangement Check Connection Failed
entry.content:
Hello, 

 I am following the tutorial  to read values from On premise system into ABAP Cloud.    https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-env-rfc.html

At the Step 8 Create Communication Arrangement . when i click on the Check connection. I am getting the message as The ping of the outbound service has failed.

1. In the Communication Systems --> General --> Host Name is same as the hostname that comes up in the browser when i run the transaction /ui2/flp  

 

2.  The Target Host Is same as the Destination Configuration -> URL < Host Name >

3. I checked the user credentials in the on premise system and the user credentials provided in Communication Systems --> Users for Outbound Communication  are the same. The same credentials are used in Cloud Connector also.   

4. When I Check the connection from Communication Arrangement . I am getting the error saying The ping of the outbound service has failed. In the error log it says the issue is in the service APS_COM_CA2_SRV .

Please help me resolve this issue. Also, Is there any better approach to connect to on premises S4HANA system . Thanks for your time and help.

entry.title: Purchase Order Delivery tab Address Change
entry.content: Do we have any EXIT/BADI to get the Purchase order-Delivery Tab Screen level data/changes ?

entry.title: Changing Movement type in Delivery and Reverse of PGI
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a export case in Public cloud in which we want to change movement type. 

I found the reelvant BAdI for changing movement type for PGI but for the case of reverse of PGI I couldn't figure out which field I need to check to understand whether it is reverse  process or not to change reverse movement type as I want.

Details as below:

BAdI I used  LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM and modified field GOODSMOVEMENTTYPE field as I want.

However for the scenerio of reverse I need to specify reverse movement type. 

Which field or BAdI I should use for modifying movement type.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 

Thanks.

entry.title: How to make a Dynamic internal table structure based on ROWS & COLUMNS
entry.content:
HI Experts,

I have a rquirement to read the Dynamic Application server file.txt() having rows, columns and values like below

(ROW 1 COLUMN 1 A,

ROW 1 COLUMN 2 B,

ROW 1 COLUMN 3 C,

ROW 2 COLUMN 1 D,

ROW 2 COLUMN 2 E,

ROW 2 COLUMN 3 F)

Now i want it this data into an column wise like below:

(ROW 1 A B C,

ROW 2 D E F) in an Excel format.

With header lines,

i made the internal table data from the values of the application server txt.file by using the string functions.

That is cleared now i want to get this internal data in the Excel file. For that I used the below code in my object.

 

TYPES : BEGIN OF ty_head,
            text1(256) TYPE c,
          END OF ty_head.

  DATA: lit_head TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_head WITH HEADER LINE,

lt_tab_str TYPE TABLE OF string. .

  lit_head-text1 = |{ TEXT-t01 } { TEXT-t02 } { TEXT-t03 } |.
  LOOP AT lt_tab_s INTO DATA(ls_tab_s).
    lit_head-text1 = |{ lit_head-text1 } { ls_tab_s-fieldname } |.
  ENDLOOP.
  lit_head-text1 = |{ lit_head-text1 } { TEXT-t04 } { TEXT-t05 } { TEXT-t06 } { TEXT-t07 } { TEXT-t08 } { TEXT-t09 } { TEXT-t10 }|.
  APPEND lit_head.
  CALL METHOD cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_download
    EXPORTING
      filename                = lv_filename
      filetype                 =  'DAT'
      fieldnames              = lit_head[]
    CHANGING
      data_tab                = lt_tab_str
    EXCEPTIONS
      file_write_error        = 1
      no_batch                = 2
      gui_refuse_filetransfer = 3
      invalid_type            = 4
      no_authority            = 5
      unknown_error           = 6
      header_not_allowed      = 7
      separator_not_allowed   = 8
      filesize_not_allowed    = 9
      header_too_long         = 10
      dp_error_create         = 11
      dp_error_send           = 12
      dp_error_write          = 13
      unknown_dp_error        = 14
      access_denied           = 15
      dp_out_of_memory        = 16
      disk_full               = 17
      dp_timeout              = 18
      file_not_found          = 19
      dataprovider_exception  = 20
      control_flush_error     = 21
      not_supported_by_gui    = 22
      error_no_gui            = 23
      OTHERS                  = 24.

But am not getting the header values in the download excel file. I got the file without header values of data. Can you please suggest any solution for this? 

Any one please suggest here.

entry.title: Simulate creation of RFQ using RAP BO
entry.content:
Hi,

Previously, we are using BAPI_QUOTATION_CREATEFROMDATA2 to simulate the creation of the quotation. When using the RAP BO(https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_REQUESTFORQUOTATIONTP), do we have any equivalent functionality? Like if there are during the MODIFY ENTITIES statement, we can call the ROLLBACK ENTITIES? Or is there an equivalent operation/API to do this?

entry.title: How to transport the scope items activated in D system to T system.
entry.content:
After add scope items in CBC systems, the related scope items are not activated in T system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Expose a custom table(ZTABLE) available in S4 HANA using CDS views to SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am trying to expose a custom CDS view that needs to be consumed in the SAC.

I have a custom table and SAP allows only CDS view to be called in the Custom CDS (data source name) that we are exposing using few annotations to CDS.

Annotations used to expose CDS : 

//@Analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE -> Unable to use this annotation.

@analytics.dataExtraction.enabled: true

@VDM.viewType: #CONSUMPTION / #BASIC -> What to use ?

@analytics.query: true

@OData.publish: true

Example: 

Table Name : ZTABLE

Fields : VBELN, POSNR, VBTYP, MATNR, WERKS, LGORT.

Is there any other solution to expose the custom table directly to SAP Analytics Cloud ? Please let me know how i can achieve a solution to this case.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Error: Action not possible for picking relevant items /SCWM/DELIVERY 183
entry.content: When creating direct outbound delivery with nested HUs, the system ends up with error /SCWM/DELIVERY 183. This error is captured in /SCWM/CL_IM_PRDO_ACTION_HU~CREATE_ITEM_FOR_HU in line 382 loop, where item relevance is validated for WM move. Since its relevant, the error message was displayed. I am not sure why the status relevant is an error here. Please advise if anyone have any experience or solution for creating direct outbound delivery with nested HU.

entry.title: SAP ABAP
entry.content: SQL error 600 occurred when accessing program sapm

entry.title: Error occurs on hdbviews execution after adding meins field to FBL3H
entry.content:
Hi experts, I am adding meins to fbl3h but when I try to execute HDBviews for adding new field to FBL3H it occurs error. Also when I delete the meins field error become disapeared.

Thanks for reply.

entry.title: Does Embedded Steampunk on-premise require BTP service key
entry.content: We are investigating Embedded Steampunk on-premise in S/4Hana 2022 SP2. From Eclipse, there is an option for ABAP Cloud Project, is this embedded steampunk? When selected it prompts for a Service key. Is BTP required to use the Embedded Steampunk functionality on-premise?

entry.title: Error in RFC Connection
entry.content:
Hi, while i am creating RFC Connection i have got error like this, can anyone tell how to resolve this and why i am getting this error.

Error Details Error when opening an RFC connection (CPIC-CALL: 'ThSAPOCMINIT', communication r

Error Details ERROR: partner 'telemedia-ap-static-157.13.175.122.airtelbroadband.in:sapgw81

Error Details LOCATION: SAP-Gateway on host SAPECC-EPPI.svm.com / sapgw00

Error Details DETAIL: NiPConnect2: 122.175.13.157:3300

Error Details CALL: connect

Error Details COMPONENT: NI (network interface)

Error Details COUNTER: 23975

Error Details ERROR NUMBER: 10060

Error Details ERROR TEXT: WSAETIMEDOUT: Connection timed out

Error Details MODULE: D:/depot/bas/753_REL/src/base/ni/nixxi.cpp

Error Details LINE: 3450

Error Details RETURN CODE: -10

Error Details SUBRC: 0

Error Details RELEASE: 753

Error Details TIME: Wed Feb 21 10:27:13 2024

Error Details VERSION: 40

entry.title: Model product Specification Odata service in ABAP Cloud environment
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

I have a requirement to read the model product specification details and when tried to create a CDS using the entities I_MODELPRODUCTSPECIFICATIONTP , I_ModProdSpecItemTP was getting the below error . Kindly share an alternate approach to achieve the same . I cannot use the standard tables mmpur_mps_header ,mmpur_mps_item in the CDS as the Lang version is 'ABAP For Cloud Dev' .

The use of element MODELPRODUCTSPECIFICATIONUUID of CDS ENTITY I_MODELPRODUCTSPECIFICATIONTP is not permitted.
The use of CDS ENTITY I_MODELPRODUCTSPECIFICATIONTP is not permitted.

Regards,

Niranjan

entry.title: How to create CR using SOAP BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Using Service ( BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In ) can we save change request in Draft Mode? if yes what was the parameter need to be passed in the input level ?

And need to capture the the warning ,error or Success messages as well . can any one help me on the development.

SAP Master Data Governance 

SAP BTP, ABAP environment 

 

@markus_greutter 

@SAPABAP 

@MDGS

entry.title: create inline a filter table with new abap syntax
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I have a table productions containing, among others, article ids. Now I want to loop over all entries for which no Article ID exists in the articleIs table. Can I do this inline with the new abap syntax. 

Something like this

 

LOOP AT filter #( productions IN articles where ArticleId not in articles-ArticleId ) INTO DATA(production).

 

Does anyone know if this is possible.

Thanks and regards,

Sebastian
